channel.title: Awesome Mac - 最近新增应用
channel.description: 根据中文列表整理的最近新增 macOS 应用。

item.title: Revu
item.category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记
item.description: Category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记 App: Revu Description: 本地优先的间隔重复学习应用，支持 FSRS 排程和 Anki 导入。 Website: https://revu.cards/ Commit: Add Revu to the ja/ko/zh list. #1955 Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/11a0d97fb3707c4b5487e3b9618141cfdc20abb4
item.content:encoded:
Category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记
App: Revu
Description: 本地优先的间隔重复学习应用，支持 FSRS 排程和 Anki 导入。
Website: https://revu.cards/
Commit: Add Revu to the ja/ko/zh list. #1955
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/11a0d97fb3707c4b5487e3b9618141cfdc20abb4

item.title: Trae
item.category: 开发者工具 / 编辑器
item.description: Category: 开发者工具 / 编辑器 App: Trae Description: 面向软件开发的 AI IDE。 Website: https://www.trae.ai/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a
item.content:encoded:
Category: 开发者工具 / 编辑器
App: Trae
Description: 面向软件开发的 AI IDE。
Website: https://www.trae.ai/
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a

item.title: LINQPad
item.category: 开发者工具 / 开发者实用工具
item.description: Category: 开发者工具 / 开发者实用工具 App: LINQPad Description: 用于运行代码、查询数据和探索数据库的 .NET 草稿本。 Website: https://www.linqpad.net/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a
item.content:encoded:
Category: 开发者工具 / 开发者实用工具
App: LINQPad
Description: 用于运行代码、查询数据和探索数据库的 .NET 草稿本。
Website: https://www.linqpad.net/
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a

item.title: Poirot
item.category: 开发者工具 / 开发者实用工具
item.description: Category: 开发者工具 / 开发者实用工具 App: Poirot Description: 用于浏览 Claude Code 会话、查看差异和重跑命令的配套工具。 Open Source: https://github.com/LeonardoCardoso/Poirot Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a
item.content:encoded:
Category: 开发者工具 / 开发者实用工具
App: Poirot
Description: 用于浏览 Claude Code 会话、查看差异和重跑命令的配套工具。
Open Source: https://github.com/LeonardoCardoso/Poirot
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a

item.title: SaneHosts
item.category: 开发者工具 / 开发者实用工具
item.description: Category: 开发者工具 / 开发者实用工具 App: SaneHosts Description: 基于 hosts 的广告与追踪器拦截工具。 Website: https://sanehosts.com Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a
item.content:encoded:

Website: https://sanehosts.com
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a

item.title: Testpiler
item.category: 开发者工具 / 开发者实用工具
item.description: Category: 开发者工具 / 开发者实用工具 App: Testpiler Description: 将 XCTest 测试转换为 Swift Testing 的工具。 Website: https://furnacecreek.org/testpiler/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a
item.content:encoded:
Category: 开发者工具 / 开发者实用工具
App: Testpiler
Description: 将 XCTest 测试转换为 Swift Testing 的工具。
Website: https://furnacecreek.org/testpiler/
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a

item.title: Cocoa-Way
item.category: 虚拟机
item.description: Category: 虚拟机 App: Cocoa-Way Description: 无需虚拟机即可运行 Linux 图形应用的 Wayland 合成器。 Open Source: https://github.com/J-x-Z/cocoa-way Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a
item.content:encoded:
Category: 虚拟机
App: Cocoa-Way
Description: 无需虚拟机即可运行 Linux 图形应用的 Wayland 合成器。
Open Source: https://github.com/J-x-Z/cocoa-way
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs

item.category: 开发者工具 / API开发和分析

item.title: Noteship
item.category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记
item.description: Category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记 App: Noteship Description: 本地优先的笔记应用，可将笔记整理为结构化知识。 Website: https://noteship.com Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a

item.title: Stik
item.category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记
item.description: Category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记 App: Stik Description: 支持全局快捷键和 AI 语义搜索的快速 Markdown 笔记应用。 Open Source: https://github.com/0xMassi/stik_app Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a
item.content:encoded:
Category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记
App: Stik
Description: 支持全局快捷键和 AI 语义搜索的快速 Markdown 笔记应用。
Open Source: https://github.com/0xMassi/stik_app
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a

item.title: VNote
item.category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记
item.description: Category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记 App: VNote Description: 带优秀编辑体验的开源 Markdown 笔记应用。 Website: https://app.vnote.fun/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a

item.title: BookShelves
item.category: 电子书
item.description: Category: 电子书 App: BookShelves Description: 集电子书阅读与书库管理于一体的应用，提供公共领域书籍与同步功能。 Website: https://getbookshelves.app/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a
item.content:encoded:
Category: 电子书
App: BookShelves
Description: 集电子书阅读与书库管理于一体的应用，提供公共领域书籍与同步功能。
Website: https://getbookshelves.app/
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a

item.title: PDF Auditor
item.category: 电子书 / 其他
item.description: Category: 电子书 / 其他 App: PDF Auditor Description: 用于分析元数据、结构和安全风险的 PDF 检查工具。 Website: https://pura-vida.in/apps/pdf-auditor/?utm_source=github&utm_medium=awesome-mac Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a
item.content:encoded:
Category: 电子书 / 其他
App: PDF Auditor
Description: 用于分析元数据、结构和安全风险的 PDF 检查工具。
Website: https://pura-vida.in/apps/pdf-auditor/?utm_source=github&utm_medium=awesome-mac
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a

item.title: PDFsail
item.category: 电子书 / 其他
item.description: Category: 电子书 / 其他 App: PDFsail Description: 集编辑、转换、合并、压缩和 OCR 于一体的 PDF 工具。 Website: https://pdfsail.com/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a
item.content:encoded:
Category: 电子书 / 其他
App: PDFsail
Description: 集编辑、转换、合并、压缩和 OCR 于一体的 PDF 工具。
Website: https://pdfsail.com/
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions across localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ed0349ea7a5694641df21a7a6a66c1a0a9d5b98a

item.title: ClearanceKit
item.category: 安全工具
item.description: Category: 安全工具 App: ClearanceKit Description: 基于策略的文件访问控制工具，可阻止未授权进程读取或修改受保护路径。 Website: https://craigjbass.github.io/clearancekit/ Commit: Add ClearanceKit to the ja/ko/zh list. (#1958) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/87607a5d4de2a044515a2a619beeba993fd6385e
item.content:encoded:
Category: 安全工具
App: ClearanceKit
Description: 基于策略的文件访问控制工具，可阻止未授权进程读取或修改受保护路径。
Website: https://craigjbass.github.io/clearancekit/
Commit: Add ClearanceKit to the ja/ko/zh list. (#1958)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/87607a5d4de2a044515a2a619beeba993fd6385e

item.title: Paul
item.category: 开发者工具 / 数据库
item.description: Category: 开发者工具 / 数据库 App: Paul Description: AI 优先的 PostgreSQL 客户端，默认只读，帮你快速从数据库中获得答案。 Website: https://guillim.github.io/products/paul Commit: Add Paul to the ja/zh/ko list. #1956 Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/9eed57d9bd5d3cf8fa394e63bb23e6c042892ae3
item.content:encoded:
Category: 开发者工具 / 数据库
App: Paul
Description: AI 优先的 PostgreSQL 客户端，默认只读，帮你快速从数据库中获得答案。
Website: https://guillim.github.io/products/paul
Commit: Add Paul to the ja/zh/ko list. #1956
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/9eed57d9bd5d3cf8fa394e63bb23e6c042892ae3

item.title: ReadAny
item.category: 电子书
item.description: Category: 电子书 App: ReadAny Description: 一款支持语义搜索、AI 问答和笔记管理的电子书阅读器。[![Open-Source Software][OSS Icon]](https://github.com/codedogQBY/ReadAny) Website: https://codedogqby.github.io/ReadAny/ Commit: Add ReadAny Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/6e1899b10d1d3623ab1293a3f5a55f18cc9a936c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 电子书
App: ReadAny
Description: 一款支持语义搜索、AI 问答和笔记管理的电子书阅读器。[![Open-Source Software][OSS Icon]](https://github.com/codedogQBY/ReadAny)
Website: https://codedogqby.github.io/ReadAny/
Commit: Add ReadAny
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/6e1899b10d1d3623ab1293a3f5a55f18cc9a936c

item.title: NetFluss
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具 App: NetFluss Description: 在菜单栏实时显示上下行网速和带宽占用应用的原生工具。 Website: https://www.ranagmbh.de/netfluss/ Commit: Add NetFluss Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/26a025a470a54ccd166c7c99b44d65af5a1b93a8
item.content:encoded:
Category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具
App: NetFluss
Description: 在菜单栏实时显示上下行网速和带宽占用应用的原生工具。
Website: https://www.ranagmbh.de/netfluss/
Commit: Add NetFluss
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/26a025a470a54ccd166c7c99b44d65af5a1b93a8

item.title: Buffer
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 剪贴板工具
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 剪贴板工具 App: Buffer Description: 轻量的开源剪贴板管理工具，支持图片 OCR 和书签。 Open Source: https://github.com/samirpatil2000/Buffer Commit: Add Buffer. Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/7efb1f36272e794c3a07ec70c331d77a4bf24774
item.content:encoded:
Category: 其它实用工具 / 剪贴板工具
App: Buffer
Description: 轻量的开源剪贴板管理工具，支持图片 OCR 和书签。
Open Source: https://github.com/samirpatil2000/Buffer
Commit: Add Buffer.
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/7efb1f36272e794c3a07ec70c331d77a4bf24774

item.title: OpenScreen
item.category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制
item.description: Category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制 App: OpenScreen Description: 用于制作产品演示和操作讲解视频的开源工具。 Open Source: https://github.com/siddharthvaddem/openscreen Commit: Add OpenScreen Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/c207eeb5e8d96d3b1adc67484bf666907ff2105d
item.content:encoded:
Category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制
App: OpenScreen
Description: 用于制作产品演示和操作讲解视频的开源工具。
Open Source: https://github.com/siddharthvaddem/openscreen
Commit: Add OpenScreen
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/c207eeb5e8d96d3b1adc67484bf666907ff2105d

item.title: EnviousWispr
item.category: 音频和视频
item.description: Category: 音频和视频 App: EnviousWispr Description: 本地 AI 语音转文本工具，可将语音快速整理成可直接粘贴的文本。 Website: https://enviouswispr.com/ Commit: Add EnviousWispr (#1948) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/09be3dbc751fb9b903d10f8b663f2c345567de7e
item.content:encoded:
Category: 音频和视频
App: EnviousWispr
Description: 本地 AI 语音转文本工具，可将语音快速整理成可直接粘贴的文本。
Website: https://enviouswispr.com/
Commit: Add EnviousWispr (#1948)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/09be3dbc751fb9b903d10f8b663f2c345567de7e

item.title: Claudoscope
item.category: AI 工具
item.description: Category: AI 工具 App: Claudoscope Description: 用于浏览、分析和管理 Claude Code 会话，支持时间线、成本估算和敏感信息扫描。 Open Source: https://github.com/cordwainersmith/claudoscope Commit: Add Claudoscope to the ja/ko/zh list. #1946 Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/7fb9b937a00af6d6059b810ac2d99b6d69e3eb8f
item.content:encoded:
Category: AI 工具
App: Claudoscope
Description: 用于浏览、分析和管理 Claude Code 会话，支持时间线、成本估算和敏感信息扫描。
Open Source: https://github.com/cordwainersmith/claudoscope
Commit: Add Claudoscope to the ja/ko/zh list. #1946
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/7fb9b937a00af6d6059b810ac2d99b6d69e3eb8f

item.title: StreamWindow
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 窗口管理
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 窗口管理 App: StreamWindow Description: 带 3D 动画和直观视图的窗口管理工具。 Website: https://macdev.cn/ Commit: Add StreamWindow to the ja/ko/zh list. #1944 Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/5092da64a840d713f0567fbe231f5f8c41ee62fa
item.content:encoded:
Category: 其它实用工具 / 窗口管理
App: StreamWindow
Description: 带 3D 动画和直观视图的窗口管理工具。
Website: https://macdev.cn/
Commit: Add StreamWindow to the ja/ko/zh list. #1944
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/5092da64a840d713f0567fbe231f5f8c41ee62fa

item.title: Atomic Chat

item.description: Category: AI 工具 App: Atomic Chat Description: 支持本地 LLM、云模型、MCP 和 OpenAI 兼容 API 的开源 AI 聊天客户端。 Open Source: https://github.com/AtomicBot-ai/Atomic-Chat Commit: Add Atomic Chat Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/bd7eb478d51c6ef17c18cb0274d682531af2fcb3

Open Source: https://github.com/AtomicBot-ai/Atomic-Chat

item.title: Repose
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具 App: Repose Description: 一款会在休息时间调暗屏幕并在通话时自动暂停的菜单栏休息计时器。 Open Source: https://github.com/fikrikarim/repose Commit: Add Repose to the ja/ko/zh list. (#1935) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/c53c14bea478c0c1512b71274582eaea627a7c93

Open Source: https://github.com/fikrikarim/repose
Commit: Add Repose to the ja/ko/zh list. (#1935)

item.content:encoded:

item.title: markdown-quicklook
item.category: QuickLook插件
item.description: Category: QuickLook插件 App: markdown-quicklook Description: 渲染 Markdown 预览，支持语法高亮、YAML front matter、可配置字体/颜色，以及菜单栏切换开关。一键安装。 Open Source: https://github.com/ruspg/markdown-quicklook Commit: Add markdown-quicklook to QuickLook Plugins section (#1934) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/6f0cbac0aae80f402ed3d21d73a646b9a62a147b
item.content:encoded:
Category: QuickLook插件
App: markdown-quicklook
Description: 渲染 Markdown 预览，支持语法高亮、YAML front matter、可配置字体/颜色，以及菜单栏切换开关。一键安装。
Open Source: https://github.com/ruspg/markdown-quicklook
Commit: Add markdown-quicklook to QuickLook Plugins section (#1934)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/6f0cbac0aae80f402ed3d21d73a646b9a62a147b

item.title: macshot
item.category: 设计和产品 / 截图工具
item.description: Category: 设计和产品 / 截图工具 App: macshot Description: 原生 macOS 截图和标注工具，灵感来自 Flameshot，支持屏幕录制、滚动截图和 OCR。 Open Source: https://github.com/sw33tlie/macshot Commit: Add macshot to Screenshot Tools (#1916) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/7ca42baf8d20b6225fb3aa12a1236e812f9fc9b3
item.content:encoded:
Category: 设计和产品 / 截图工具
App: macshot
Description: 原生 macOS 截图和标注工具，灵感来自 Flameshot，支持屏幕录制、滚动截图和 OCR。
Open Source: https://github.com/sw33tlie/macshot
Commit: Add macshot to Screenshot Tools (#1916)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/7ca42baf8d20b6225fb3aa12a1236e812f9fc9b3

item.title: App Uninstaller
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 清理卸载
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 清理卸载 App: App Uninstaller Description: 轻量级应用卸载工具，支持拖放操作。使用 Swift 和 SwiftUI 构建。[![Open-Source Software][OSS Icon]](https://github.com/kamjin3086/AppUninstaller) Open Source: https://github.com/kamjin3086/AppUninstaller Commit: Add App Uninstaller to Cleanup and Uninstall section (#1913) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ffcaf60b826240c20afa9d945b4bf748cae483d8
item.content:encoded:
Category: 其它实用工具 / 清理卸载
App: App Uninstaller
Description: 轻量级应用卸载工具，支持拖放操作。使用 Swift 和 SwiftUI 构建。[![Open-Source Software][OSS Icon]](https://github.com/kamjin3086/AppUninstaller)
Open Source: https://github.com/kamjin3086/AppUninstaller
Commit: Add App Uninstaller to Cleanup and Uninstall section (#1913)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ffcaf60b826240c20afa9d945b4bf748cae483d8

Website: https://orchard.5km.tech/
